text:
This Digimon was fused from the Virus Busters
WarGreymon and MetalGarurumon through the will
of those who wish for good. Omnimon is able to
draw on the qualities of both Digimon to the fullest
extent under any circumstance, making it a capable
and versatile fighter. Its left arm is in the shape of
WarGreymon and is equipped with a sword and
shield, and its right arm takes the shape of
MetalGarurumon and is equipped with a cannon
and missiles. The cloak on its back deploys
automatically when it needs to avoid enemy attacks
or to fly. Its special move is Supreme Cannon, which
fires a blast of air at absolute zero from its
MetalGarurumon-shaped cannon to freeze the
enemy. Additionally, the sword it bears on its left
arm is the invisible blade, Transcendent Sword.

■Effects of the X Antibody on Omnimon's DigiCore:
Theoretically, it should be impossible for any other
Digimon to defeat Omnimon. This is due to its
acquisition of the ultimate power known as Omni
inForce (a term coined from the words "Omni,"
"Gain," and "Force") which grants it the ability to
instantly see and react to what is about to happen
in battle. This increases Omnimon's combat sense
and potential to the absolute maximum at all times.
Also, in battles where the threat to network
security is so severe that Omnimon cannot afford
to lose, it can unleash the special move All Delete
using the Transcendent Sword. While All Delete is
active, anything touched by the blade is not cut,
but erased.

Gallantmon is a Holy Knight Digimon counted
among the Royal Knights alongside Omnimon and
Magnamon. The Royal Knights are the highest-
ranking Digimon in terms of network security,
and no Digimon has ever been able to crack their
stalwart defenses. But given Gallantmon's Virus
attribute, its role as one of the chief protectors of
the Net inherently conflicts with its nature. This
means there is a minute chance that this balance
could break and it becomes a threat instead.
Gallantmon is clad in holy armor made of 99.9%
pure Chrondigizoid, and it wields the holy lance
Gram in its right hand while bearing the holy shield
Aegis in its left. Chivalrous by nature, Gallantmon
is a faithful servant of its liege. Its special moves
are Lightning Joust, which unleashes a powerful
thrust from Gram, and Shield of the Just, which
fires a purifying beam from Aegis.

■Effects of the X Antibody on Gallantmon's DigiCore:
After risking its life in countless holy battles while
maintaining its fidelity as a knight, Gallantmon has
at last been blessed with holy armor, a holy lance,
and a holy shield of the highest quality. These arms
and armor consist of a sacred hybrid of the rare
metals Red Digizoid, Blue Digizoid, Gold Digizoid
and the purest Chrondigizoid known to exist.
Gallantmon has also transformed to better suit this
holy power and acquired a new special move named
Zeig Saber, which uses its newfound sacred might to
amplify and greatly enlarge the spear of light that it
fires from the holy lance Gram. What's more, it is
said that Gallantmon gave the red cape it had before
obtaining the power of the X Antibody to the hero
Leomon.

UlforceVeedramon is a legendary Holy Knight Digimon
appearing only in a prophecy passed down from the
ancient Digital World. The appearance of the Royal
Knights, the holy defenders of the Network, was
written of in this prophecy, and it is said the members
of the Royal Knights will all gather under the prophecy
when the Digital World faces its greatest crisis. Even
among the Royal Knights, UlforceVeedramon's speed
is exceptional, such that it is impossible to follow its
movements. Clad in armor of Blue Chrondigizoit—an
extremely rare metal, and the lightest form of any
Chrondigizoit—UlforceVeedramon shoots through
the sky and blasts across the earth. Should it ever
require a weapon or shield, it can deploy its Victory
Sword or Tense-Great Shield from the V-Bracelets on
its arms. Its special move is The Ray of Victory, which
fires a beam of energy from the V-shaped armor on
its chest to wipe out foes.

■Effects of the X Antibody on UlforceVeedramon's
DigiCore: In addition to its godlike speed, its ultimate
Ulforce power has also been drawn out further.
Ulforce also has an astounding healing factor,
allowing UlforceVeedramon to heal any damage it
receives immediately. Even if it were to be caught
and attacked, it would likely counter instantly with
one hundred percent of its power.

An Armor Holy Knight Digimon that has Digivolved
through the power of the Digi-Egg of Miracles.
Imbued with the attribute of Metal and made of
the super-metal Chrondigizoit, this Digi-Egg holds
immense defensive capability and offensive might
on par with, if not exceeding, that of Mega
Digimon. True to its name, gaining the wondrous
power of the Digi-Egg of Miracles would allow
one to overcome any crisis. Magnamon uses its
special move Plasma Shot to fire a ball of pure
plasma, and Shining Gold Solar Storm to explode
condensed air into golden laser beams that
sweep away surrounding foes.

■Effects of the X Antibody on Magnamon's DigiCore:
Its one-of-a-kind Chrondigizoid grows stronger the
more it is tempered. Magnamon's virtual super-
metal is fully integrated into the Digimon's body,
growing and atrophying just like ordinary muscle
tissue. This miraculous Digivolution is thought to
have been achieved through the unique properties
of Chrondigizoid created close to its natural state
using ancient techniques (the Digi-Egg of Miracles)
which allows it to integrate with living creatures, in
combination with Magnamon's own power. By
tensing its Chrondigizoid muscles, it can temporarily
transform into a glimmering Gold Digizoid state,
offering absolute defensive power capable of
withstanding physical and even data-disintegrating
attacks. Furthermore, this Gold Digizoid state bears
properties akin to Huanglong Ore, the special
mineral Chrondigizoid is formed from that boasts
unparalleled, absolute hardness. Its perfect
defense is accompanied by a specific gravity
unsuited to Digimon, but Magnamon is able to
overcome this by thoroughly tempering its
Chrondigizoid.

A Mutant Digimon that can travel freely between
Digital Worlds in different dimensions. This baleful
existence devours the data of Digimon in the worlds
it crosses over to, and its purpose is a mystery.
Parallelmon appears in unexpected places at
unexpected times, and its coming heralds
pandemonium for the world. As such, research teams
consider its very appearance to be a calamity. One of
Parallelmon's special moves is Absorbent Bang, which
fires a beam from its eyes that absorbs Digimon.
Anything besides Digimon hit by this beam is flung to
some other dimension. It also has Endless Trance,
which attacks unilaterally from the countless gates it
opens around the enemy.

When the crystal on SaviorHuckmon's chest began
to glow, it Digivolved into its ultimate, transcendent
form. Jesmon is a Holy Knight Digimon that has
earned its place among the Royal Knights, the
highest-ranking Digimon in network security. With
the ability to detect signs of impending chaos and
other disturbances throughout the Digital World,
it is able to rush to the scene faster than any other
Royal Knights. Trusting of others, it prefers to
coordinate its efforts with the Sistermon siblings
and other nearby Digimon rather than acting
alone, in part to keep itself from growing
overconfident. Such cooperative nature is a rarity 
among the Royal Knights. Learning by watching
the Hinukamuy of its master Gankoomon, Jesmon
acquired Atho, René and Por during its training.
This trio boasts formidable versatility, capable of
operating both under Jesmon's command as well
as autonomously to attack foes directly, support
Jesmon, or render aid upon other Digimon.

■Effects of the X Antibody on Jesmon's DigiCore:
The X Antibody has transformed all of Jesmon's
armor into blades, granting it a form even more
focused on offense. Each of the many swords
Jesmon is now equipped with is also capable of
autonomous movement, allowing this Digimon
to continually overwhelm opponents when
fighting one-on-one with a constant barrage of
attacks. Furthermore, the three programs Atho,
René, and Por have now fused and awakened as
a single being, the Tactical Arms. This allows
Jesmon to make use of an entirely new combat
style with which it attacks in all directions
without ever leaving itself vulnerable. This
Digimon's special moves include Iron-Fist
Judgment, which uses its new Tactical Arms to
bludgeon foes with iron fists that would do
Gankoomon proud, and Weltflügel, which involves
launching all the swords on its body toward the
enemy while unleashing a flurry of attacks with the
greatswords in its hands. Finally, it has a nonlethal
ace in the hole, drawing the Ultimate Seibaken out
of the DigiCore in its chest and slicing through foes.
Those cut by this sword lose only their fighting
instinct, rendering them unable to battle any
longer.
